name: SaaS Dashboard
description: Analytics and admin dashboard with KPIs, data tables, charts, user management, and settings.
personality: Clean, data-driven SaaS dashboard. Neutral tones with a single accent color for CTAs and active states. Card-based layout with consistent spacing. Charts use the accent palette. Navigation is efficient and keyboard-accessible. Think Linear meets Stripe dashboard.

voice.tone: Professional and concise. Informative without being verbose. Data speaks for itself.
voice.empty_states: Friendly and action-oriented. Explain what will appear here and provide a single clear next step.
voice.errors: Direct and helpful. State what went wrong and suggest a fix. No blame language.
voice.loading: Show skeleton placeholders matching the content shape. No spinner text — let the layout speak.
